user.title: Hockey Tracker — Setup
user.description: Choose what you want to track.

data_description.entry_type: Team Tracker follows a single team. Playoff Tracker follows a league's full playoff bracket with up to 4 teams.

league.title: Hockey Tracker — Select League
league.description: Choose the league you want to track.

api_key.title: Hockey Tracker — API Key
api_key.description: Enter the HockeyTech API key for the {league}. See [setup instructions]({docs_url}) for how to obtain it.

team.title: Hockey Tracker — Select Team
team.description: Choose the team you want to track.

followed_teams.title: Playoff Tracker — Followed Teams
followed_teams.description: Select up to {max_teams} teams to follow in the playoffs. You will receive notifications and see live game data for these teams.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the API. Check your network.
error.no_teams: Connected successfully but no teams were returned.
error.too_many_teams: You can follow a maximum of 4 teams.

abort.already_configured_playoff: A playoff tracker for this league and team combination is already configured.

init.title: Hockey Tracker — Notifications
init.description: Configure push notifications for game events. Enable a type with the toggle, then select one or more notification targets.

data_description.notify_win_enabled: Send an alert when the tracked team wins a game.
data_description.notify_win_targets: Which notify services receive the win alert.
data_description.notify_pregame_enabled: Send a reminder approximately 30 minutes before puck drop.
data_description.notify_pregame_targets: Which notify services receive the pre-game reminder.
data_description.notify_goal_enabled: Send an alert each time the tracked team scores a goal.
data_description.notify_goal_targets: Which notify services receive the goal alert.
